zh.lifeSummary: 當Andrew Williamson於1641年6月出生在英國爾維爾姆斯洛福時，他的父親Sir John Williamson37歲，母親Jane Harrope38歲。他於大約1668年與Sarah King在美國維吉尼亞州米德萊可可利斯丘其結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1641年住在英國爾。他去世於1682年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Andrew Williamson于1641年6月出生在英国爾維爾姆斯洛福时，他的父亲Sir John Williamson37岁，母亲Jane Harrope38岁。他于大约1668年与Sarah King在美国弗吉尼亚州米德萊可可利斯丘其结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1641年住在英国爾。他去世于1682年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Williamson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northern) and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name William + patronymic -son ‘son of William’. This surname is also found in Northern Ireland (Ulster), especially in Antrim.
Americanized form of Norwegian, Danish, and North German Wilhelmsen , Swedish Wilhelmsson, or Dutch and North German Willemsen , all cognates of 1.

History: This surname was brought to North America from northern England and northern Ireland independently by numerous different bearers from the 17th century onward. Timothy Williamson is recorded in Plymouth Colony in 1643.

variants.name: Willamson
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Williamson  .

variants.name: William
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name William, Willam, Willem, an Old Picard and Norman French form of ancient Germanic Willihelm, composed of the elements wil- ‘will, desire’ + helm- ‘helmet, protection’. This Norman personal name became widely used in England, Scotland and Wales after the Conquest, mainly no doubt in honor of the Conqueror himself. By the 13th century it had already become the most popular personal name in England. A Parisian form of the name Guillaume was also sometimes used (see Gillam ), which in medieval Wales was adopted as Gwilym (see Gwilliam ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Guillaume  .

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Andrew Williamson was born in June 1641, in Wilmslow, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir John Williamson, was 37 and his mother, Jane Harrope, was 38. He married Sarah King about 1668, in Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He lived in Cheshire, England in 1641. He died in 1682, in Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Andrew Williamson est né en juin 1641, à Wilmslow, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Williamson, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Jane Harrope, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Sarah King environ 1668, à Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Il a vécu à Cheshire, Angleterre en 1641. Il est décédé en 1682, à Middlesex, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Andrew Williamson im Juni 1641 in Wilmslow, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Williamson 37 und seine Mutter Jane Harrope 38. Er hat um 1668 in Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten Sarah King geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1641 hat er in Cheshire, England gelebt. Er starb 1682 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew Williamson è nato il nel giugno 1641 nel Wilmslow, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Williamson, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Jane Harrope, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Sarah King circa 1668, nel Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Vissuto a Cheshire, England nel 1641. Morì nel 1682, nel Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Andrew Williamsonが1641年6月にイギリスチェシュアイアウィルムスロウで生まれた時，父Sir John Williamsonは37歳，母Jane Harropeは38歳であった。約1668年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州ミッドレセックスチリストチャーチでSarah Kingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1641年にはイギリスチェシュアイアに住んでいた。彼は1682年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ミッドレセックスで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Andrew Williamson(이)가 1641년 6월 영국 체실르 윌슬로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Williamson(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Harrope(은)는 38세였다. 그는 대략 1668년 미국 버지니아 주 미들레세스 크리스트c후르치에서 Sarah King(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1641년도에 영국 체실르에서 살았다. 그는 1682년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 미들레세스에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew Williamson nasceu em junho de 1641, em Wilmslow, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Williamson, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Jane Harrope, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah King aproximadamente 1668, em Christchurch, Middlesex, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele viveu em Cheshire, Inglaterra em 1641. Ele faleceu em 1682, em Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andrew Williamson родился июнь 1641 г. в местности уилмслоу, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Williamson было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Harrope, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah King около 1668 г. в местности крисчурч, миддлесекс, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Он жил в местности чешир, Англия в 1641 году. Он умер в 1682 г. в местности миддлесекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Andrew Williamson nació en junio de 1641, en Wilmslow, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Williamson, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Jane Harrope, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Sarah King aproximadamente 1668, en Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Vivió en Cheshire, Inglaterra en 1641.
